name: Bible Baptist Church
description: Bible Baptist Church is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Appomattox, VA. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.

name: Grace Hills Baptist Church
description: Grace Hills Baptist Church is a place to play pickleball in Appomattox, VA. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. Reservations are not available.
hours: Wednesday 6pm. We resume our monthly ELC coffee service on Tuesday, March 10 from 7-8:30am

name: Memorial United Methodist Church
description: Memorial United Methodist Church is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Appomattox, VA. There is 1 indoor wood court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are not available. Amenities include restrooms and water. The court is free.
